debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.split_epi α C X Y f ↔ ∀ (c : α), Function.Surjective fun g => comp f g

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · rintro ⟨g, hg⟩ c
    refine ⟨g ≫ (id c), ?_⟩
    simpa [Category.split_epi, Category.IsRetraction, assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  · intro hs
    have hY : Function.Surjective (fun g : Hom Y Y => f ≫ g) := hs Y
    rcases hY (id Y) with ⟨g, hg⟩
    refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
    exact hg

constructor
  · rintro ⟨g, hg⟩ c h
    refine ⟨g ≫ h, ?_⟩
    simpa [Function.comp, Category.comp, Category.assoc, hg]
  · intro hs
    have hsurj : Function.Surjective (fun g : Hom Y X => f ≫ g) := hs X
    rcases hsurj (id X) with ⟨g, hg⟩
    exact ⟨g, hg⟩

constructor
  · rintro ⟨g, hg⟩ c h
    refine ⟨g ≫ h, ?_⟩
    simpa [Function.comp, Category.comp, Category.assoc, hg]
  · intro hs
    have hsY : Function.Surjective (fun g : Hom Y Y => f ≫ g) := hs Y
    rcases hsY (id Y) with ⟨g, hg⟩
    refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
    simpa [Category.IsRetraction, Category.id_comp] using hg

constructor
  · rintro ⟨g, hg⟩ c
    intro h
    refine ⟨g ≫ h, ?_⟩
    dsimp
    calc
      f ≫ (g ≫ h) = (f ≫ g) ≫ h := by simp [assoc]
      _ = id X ≫ h := by simp [hg]
      _ = h := by simp
  · intro hs
    have hs' : Function.Surjective (fun g : Hom Y X => f ≫ g) := hs X
    rcases hs' (id X) with ⟨g, hg⟩
    refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
    dsimp [Category.IsRetraction]
    simpa using hg
